steps.title: Identify the key phrase
steps.content: The phrase “altering subjects to appear more beautiful or heroic than they actually were” reveals that the Romantic style enhanced or exaggerated subjects' positive traits.

steps.title: Match the target meaning
steps.content: The target meaning is to emphasize or enlarge something beyond reality. Magnify directly expresses this—to make something appear greater or more prominent than it truly is. The other three choices don't fit: “apprehend” means to understand, “rectify” means to correct, and “counteract” means to oppose. That matches choice D — D is correct.
